description: Acknowledgement of a debt between Yehuda b. Avraham ha-Levi and Yosef b. Natan. Probably erroneously dated 1501 of the Seleucid Era (= 1190 CE) by omitting the teens (Abraham who is mentioned as the Nagid only received the title in 1213 CE), and a date of 1220 CE is more likely. In the hand of Shelomo b. Eliyya. The debt is 815 dirhams. The document is not signed. (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's attached summary and transcription.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
